violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment areas of moisture and behind fryers in front cooking area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interior of reach-in prep coolers reachin cooler door gaskets reachin cooler/freezer door handles and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment areas of moisture and behind fryers in front cooking area noted in need of cleaning.

IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the bread crumbs and flour. One scoop was noted as not having a handle. Scoops with handles must be used and stored in a manner that keeps the handle out of the product.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interior of reach-in prep coolers reachin cooler door gaskets top of oven in front kitchen area and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
